title: Ingrown toenail - NHS
text:
rmation: 
Self-refer to a podiatrist If you have an ingrown toenail, you might be able to refer yourself directly to a podiatrist without seeing a GP.
To find out if there are any services in your area:
ask the reception staff at your GP surgery check your GP surgery's website contact your integrated care board (ICB) – find your local ICB search online for NHS podiatrists near you 
How to prevent ingrown toenails 
To help stop ingrown toenails:
do not cut your toenails too short cut straight across the nail, not the edges do not wear shoes that are too tight or do not fit properly keep your feet clean and dry them thoroughly 
Page last reviewed: 30 June 2025
Next review due: 30 June 2028
